content: {"analyses": [{"source_url": "https://www.nature.com/articles/s41467-024-52437-9", "source_title": "High radiative forcing climate scenario relevance analyzed ...", "source_type": "web", "source_quality": 0.7, "overall_relevance": 0.65, "year": 0, "authors": [], "venue": "", "doi": "", "atomic_facts": [{"statement": "In 2100, we project median forcings of 5.1 watt per square meters (5th to 95th percentiles of 3.3 to 7.1), with roughly 0.5% probability of ...", "direct_quote": "In 2100, we project median forcings of 5.1 watt per square meters (5th to 95th percentiles of 3.3 to 7.1), with roughly 0.5% probability of exceeding 8.5 watt per square meters, and a 1% probability of being lower than 2.6 watt per square meters.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "Although the probability of 8.5 watt per square meters scenarios is low, our results support their continued utility for calibrating damage ...", "direct_quote": "Although the probability of 8.5 watt per square meters scenarios is low, our results support their continued utility for calibrating damage functions, characterizing climate in the 22nd century (the probability of exceeding 8.5 watt per square meters", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "Because the underlying scenarios were not designed to be equally likely, the fact that 8.5 W/m2 represented the 10th percentile of available...", "direct_quote": "Because the underlying scenarios were not designed to be equally likely, the fact that 8.5 W/m2 represented the 10th percentile of available scenarios does not imply an assessment that there was a 10% likelihood of exceeding 8.5 W/m2.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}], "evidence_summary": "Auto-extracted 3 facts."}]}
